ingredients_text: Rosemary Sauce (44%) [Water, Peas, Thickener (1422), Milk Solids, Sugar, Salt, Wheat Flour, Vegetable Oil, Garlic, Spices, Butter (Milk), Natural Colour (150a), Yeast Extract, Natural Flavour, Rosemary], Reconstituted Mashed Potato (41%) {Water, Potato Flakes [Potato Flakes, Emulsifier (471), Acidity Regulator (330)], Milk Solids, Vegetable Oil, Natural Flavours (Milk), Spices, Salt, Herb}, Cooked Lamb (8%), Carrots (7%).
